title: 1v1 Transition Box (NSEW)
summary: A continuous team 1v1 drill (one team going north/south, other team east/west).  Attacker quickly transitions to defender when completing pass or dispossessed
pitchSize: 15 by 15 yard square, with four cone starting gates;
setupHtml: one team N/S, other team E/W.  split two teams equally on either side of their axis.  Start one defender in the middle to begin drill.  Spare balls at all four gates (next player up needs to be ready)
instructionsHtml:
Objective is to complete a pass across to teammate, with defender on you (1 pt per success)
If team completes the pass, defender stays in the middle until he steals or disrupts play.
If attacker fails to score (stolen, OOB), they immediately become defender against next attacker from other team.
progressionsHtml: Once they get the format, introduce games to 10 (or 4 minute scored rounds)
emphasisHtml:
Need to apply quick change of pace to separate from defender and open passing lane to target
Use feints and stop/start to disrupt defender balance
If defender is square, exploit this (nutmeg or attacking past them); defenders stay side on and maintain distance to prevent the pass.
Transition quickly - be alert
